bonusTasks.title: Freshworks' Journey from SMB to Enterprise — Product Pivots
bonusTasks.summary: Freshworks started as a helpdesk for small businesses and evolved into a multi-product enterprise suite. Their product decisions at each stage reveal the B2B PM playbook.
keyTakeaways: SMB product is about self-serve; enterprise product is about relationships
Moving upmarket requires adding admin controls, SSO, audit logs — not just more features
Pricing architecture must change as you move from per-seat to outcome-based models
